name: The Academy Is...
description:
'''The Academy Is...''' is an American [[Rock music|rock]] band from [[Chicago|Chicago, Illinois]], formed in 2003. The band is composed of [[William Beckett (singer)|William Beckett]] (vocals), Adam Siska (bass), Mike Carden (guitar), and Andy Mrotek (drums). In 2004, they were signed by the [[DCD2 Records|Decaydance]] imprint of the [[Fueled by Ramen]] label. The band has released four studio albums: ''[[Almost Here (The Academy Is album)|Almost Here]]'' (2005), ''[[Santi (album)|Santi]]'' (2007), ''[[Fast Times at Barrington High]]'' (2008), and ''[[Almost There (The Academy Is... album)|Almost There]]'' (2026), along with four EPs. They temporarily disbanded in 2011.  

On May 11, 2022, the band announced a full reunion, alongside a performance at that year's Riot Fest. The band released their first album in 18 years, ''[[Almost There (The Academy Is... album)|Almost There]]'', in March 2026.
